tasks.label: Build and Flash STM32 (Debug)
tasks.command: cmake --build build/Debug && "/Users/blurbler/Library/Application Support/stm32cube/bundles/gnu-tools-for-stm32/14.3.1+st.2/bin/arm-none-eabi-objcopy" -O binary build/Debug/Luftdruck-Sensor.elf build/Debug/Luftdruck-Sensor.bin && /opt/homebrew/bin/st-flash --connect-under-reset write build/Debug/Luftdruck-Sensor.bin 0x8000000 && echo successful

tasks.label: Test BMP180 (Debug)
tasks.command: cmake -S . -B build/Bmp180Test -G Ninja -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DCMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE=cmake/gcc-arm-none-eabi.cmake -DBMP180_TEST=ON && cmake --build build/Bmp180Test && "/Users/blurbler/Library/Application Support/stm32cube/bundles/gnu-tools-for-stm32/14.3.1+st.2/bin/arm-none-eabi-objcopy" -O binary build/Bmp180Test/Luftdruck-Sensor.elf build/Bmp180Test/Luftdruck-Sensor.bin && /opt/homebrew/bin/st-flash --connect-under-reset write build/Bmp180Test/Luftdruck-Sensor.bin 0x8000000 && echo successful
